subtitle.ja: 人差し指の構えから始めます。親指手前の糸を、全ての糸の上を越えて足の指などにかけます
subtitle.en: Begin in Opening A. Carry the near thumb strings over all the strings and place them onto a toe (or other support).

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指の輪を交換します
subtitle.en: Exchange the loops on the index fingers.

subtitle.ja: 左右の小指の輪を交換します
subtitle.en: Exchange the loops on the little fingers.
Adjust the figure to show the finished form.
